text: RUSSIA'S NOVATEK SAYS HYDROCARBON PRODUCTION TOTALED 316.6 MLN BOE IN FIRST HALF 2022, INCLUDING 40.89 BCM OF NATURAL GAS AND 5.8 MLN TONS OF LIQUIDS
